  "findings": [
    "No wire-pulling lubricant staged or prepared for a long feeder/branch pull, which will cause excessive tension and insulation damage."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Halt the pull before it begins.",
    "Procure and apply an approved, compatible wire-pulling lubricant suitable for the cable jacket type and conduit material."
  ],
  "rationale": "Attempting a long wire pull without lubricant increases pulling tension, risking severe damage to the conductor insulation and the conduit itself. While the work is only staged, proceeding without lubricant constitutes a non-compliant and defective installation method.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 310.10",
    "NEC 300.17",
    "NEC 200.6",
    "NEC 210.5"
  ]
}
